column1: # Keys are the output of normalize_firm() — verify with normalize_firm(company_name).
# fei_number: FDA Establishment Identifier for the actual drug manufacturer.
# Accord Healthcare (US) = subsidiary of Intas Pharmaceuticals
# Bristol-Myers Squibb — not in NDC labelers; main US mfg site
# Teligent Pharma — not in NDC; Drug Quality Assurance inspections under this name
# Impax Laboratories — not in NDC (acquired by Amneal 2018); legacy facility
# Prinston Pharmaceutical (US) = subsidiary of Zhejiang Huayi
# Pfizer variants that normalize to bare "PFIZER"
# Chartwell Molecular Holdings = parent of Chartwell Pharmaceuticals mfg sites
# Typo variant "Pfizer Pharmaeuticals" in shortage source data
